domains.name: Agent Lifecycle and Architecture
domains.focus: End-to-end agent lifecycle, deterministic workflows, autonomous loops, multi-agent roles, and control boundaries.

domains.name: Data Curation and Knowledge Grounding
domains.focus: Training data curation, document ingestion, retrieval, chunking, permissions, freshness, and grounding.

domains.name: Model Selection and Customization
domains.focus: Choosing base models, adapting behavior with prompts, RAG, PEFT/SFT, preference tuning, and model registries.

domains.name: Tooling, Orchestration, and Memory
domains.focus: Tool schemas, function calling, workflow orchestration, memory scopes, state management, and recovery patterns.

domains.name: Inference Serving and Deployment
domains.focus: Inference microservices, serving gateways, containers, scaling, batching, rollout controls, and API operations.

domains.name: Evaluation and Safety
domains.focus: Agent trajectory evaluation, task success, groundedness, red teaming, guardrails, policy checks, and regression suites.

domains.name: Observability, Operations, and Cost
domains.focus: Tracing, monitoring, tool-call health, p95/p99 latency, token cost, drift, incidents, and optimization loops.

domains.name: Human Oversight and Governance
domains.focus: Human-in-the-loop approval, escalation, auditability, risk tiering, compliance, and operating model design.
